summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. Four open PRs are security-sensitive and routed to central security handling; five open non-security PRs are kept independently for maintainer review because merge/close/fix actions are blocked or not justified; one listed PR is already closed and is kept closed.

actions.reason: Open PR touches plugin runtime LLM trust/auth-profile behavior and is explicitly security-sensitive in the hydrated artifact.
Independent open fix candidate; keep for maintainer review rather than close or merge in this plan-only inventory shard.
Open PR concerns skill setup execution/plugin trust boundary and must be routed to central security handling.
Independent open candidate with proof/check blockers and broader product context still open; keep for maintainer review.
Independent follow-up performance candidate with validation blockers; not closable as duplicate or superseded on current evidence.
Independent feature PR needing maintainer/product review and proof; no safe close or merge action in this shard.
Open PR changes external plugin/channel discovery behavior across a security boundary and is explicitly marked route-only.
Already closed; closure actions are invalid for closed refs, so keep_closed records the no-op classification.
Independent open bug-fix candidate paired with an open issue; keep for maintainer review and proof rather than close.
Open PR touches gateway startup/network probe behavior with a hydrated security scanner comment and explicit route-only classification.
